top.title: Zelensky says failure of US envoys to visit Kyiv is 'disrespectful'
top.summary: US envoy Steve Witkoff and Donald Trump's son-in-law Jared Kushner have travelled to Moscow several times, but never to Kyiv.

top.title: Unprecedented ruling finds Hungary's anti-LGBTQ laws in breach of EU values
top.summary: The EU's top court finds that the reforms breached EU values on a number of levels and broke the founding values of the EU treaty.

top.title: Japan loosens arms export rules in break from post-WW2 pacifism
top.summary: This clears the way for Japan to sell weapons to more than a dozen countries.

top.title: Ofcom investigating Telegram over child sexual abuse material concerns
top.summary: The popular messaging service told the BBC in a statement it "categorically denies Ofcom's accusations".

top.title: How will Apple change under 'product guy' John Ternus?
top.summary: As Tim Cook announces his departure from the top job at Apple, these are the key challenges for new boss John Ternus.

top.title: New era as Apple names new boss to replace Tim Cook after 15 years
top.summary: Ternus will take over running the technology giant in September as Cook steps up to become executive chairman.

title.#text: Apple TV has another busy summer of sci-fi with Silo season 3 in July
John Ternus’s first big problem is AI
